headline: Google's AI search is so broken it can 'disregard' what you're looking for
summary: Google's AI Overviews displayed unusual chatbot-like responses. Searching for 'disregard' led to a non-summary AI response. The feature is showing unexpected behavior for certain queries.

headline: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter is heavily discounted. It enables wireless headphone use with in-flight entertainment. The deal arrives just in time for the Memorial Day travel season.

headline: Meta's Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
summary: Meta has launched a new iPhone app called Forum, reimagining Facebook Groups. The app integrates a dedicated AI chatbot for enhanced interaction. Forum aims to provide an AI-driven community platform.

headline: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
summary: Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, is struggling with low user adoption. A Reuters report indicates minimal use by the US government last year. The 'truth-seeking' AI chatbot is not performing as expected.

headline: Rick and Morty Returns for Season 9 - Here's When You Can Watch New Episodes
summary: 'Rick and Morty' is set to return for its ninth season. New episodes will be available for streaming sooner than ever. The article details when and where to watch the upcoming season.

headline: The iBuypower Gaming PC With AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and 5090 GPU Drops Below $5,000
summary: An iBuypower gaming PC with high-end specs is now available for under $5,000. Features include an AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and an RTX 5090 GPU. The system comes with 32GB DDR5 RAM, 4TB SSD, and a 3-year warranty.

headline: Spartacus: House of Ashur Reportedly Canceled After Just 1 Season
summary: 'Spartacus: House of Ashur' has reportedly been canceled. The Starz series concluded after only one season. Creator Steven S. DeKnight's project met an early end.

headline: Destiny Players Review Bomb Marathon Only to Be Met With Countercampaign from Bungie Fans
summary: 'Destiny' players are review-bombing Bungie's 'Marathon' on Steam. This protest stems from frustrations with the game. Bungie fans have launched a counter-campaign to defend 'Marathon.'

headline: Attorney general to review teen boys' rape sentences
summary: The Attorney General will review the sentences of three teenage boys. The teens received non-custodial sentences for raping two girls. The decision follows concerns about the leniency of the original ruling.

headline: UK sees hottest day of year as bank holiday travellers face queues
summary: The UK recorded its hottest day of the year at 28.4C in some areas. Bank holiday travelers encountered significant queues and delays. Disruptions were reported at key hubs like Port of Dover and Birmingham Airport.

headline: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
summary: Senator Rubio is attempting to reassure NATO allies regarding US troop deployments. This follows President Trump's statements about sending more troops to Poland. The comments come shortly after a previous deployment was canceled.

headline: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
summary: UK scientists are developing a new Ebola vaccine targeting the Bundibugyo strain. This specific Ebola species is rare but lethal, with no current proven vaccine. The experimental vaccine could be ready for human trials within months.
